locations.name: 菲律宾
locations.summary: 菲律賓共和國（他加祿語：Republika ng Pilipinas；英語：Republic of the Philippines）簡稱菲律賓，是東南亞的群島國家。位於西太平洋，北隔呂宋海峽與臺灣相望，南隔西里伯斯海與印度尼西亚相望，西隔…

locations.name: 呂宋
locations.summary: 呂宋（他加祿語：Luzon；白話字：Lū-sòng）是菲律賓最大的島，也是世界第15大島，面積109,965平方公里。呂宋島位於菲律賓北部，是首都馬尼拉的所在地。呂宋島在台灣南方，米沙鄢群島北方，南海東方，菲律宾海西方。《劍橋百科》介紹：…

locations.name: 中央山脈 (呂宋島)
locations.summary: 中央山脉位于菲律宾吕宋岛北部中央。山脉区域涵盖了整个科迪勒拉行政区（阿布拉省、阿巴尧省、本格特省、伊富高省、卡林阿省和高山省），同时包括了北伊罗戈省东部、南伊罗戈省东部、拉乌尼翁省东部、邦阿西楠省东北部、新比斯開省西部和卡加烟省西部。 山…

locations.name: 原始森林
locations.summary: 原始森林又稱原生林，是指一个森林已经达到非常非常长久的年龄而没有遭到显著的干扰，成功表现出独特的生态特征，并可能被归类为顶极群落。原生特性包括多样化的树有关的结构，提供多样化的野生动物栖息地，增加了森林生态系统的生物多样性。多样化的树结构…

locations.name: 次生林
locations.summary: 次生林，又名天然次生林、再生林、再生森林、二次林。是指原始穩定的森林植被遭到人類活動干擾（刀耕火種、林木砍伐）或同等破壞性的自然現象之後，主要透過自然過程再生形成的森林或林地區域。其特徵有別於未曾遭受近期干擾的原始森林、複雜的早期遷移階段…

relations.subject: Cordillera ground warbler
relations.evidence: It is endemic to the Philippines, where it is found in northwest Luzon in the foothills of the Cordillera Mountain Range.s natural habitat is tropical moist lowland forests

relations.subject: Cordillera ground warbler
relations.evidence: It is found in lowland moist dipterocarp forest, in primary forest, secondary forest and forest edge up to 500 m

relations.subject: Cordillera ground warbler

relations.subject: Cordillera ground warbler
relations.evidence: It is typically found on the forest floor among limestone outcrops, bamboo and mossy rocks. IUCN previously assessed this bird as vulnerable with the population being estimated at 2,500 to 9,999 mature individuals but this was updated to Near-threatened.This downlisting does not mean that this species is increasing but rather reflects data that this species may occurs in higher densities than originally believed

relations.subject: Cordillera ground warbler
relations.evidence: This species is found in only one protected area the Kalbario–Patapat Natural Park

relations.subject: Cordillera ground warbler
relations.evidence: It has only been photographed once in the wild. It is threatened by habitat loss
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

relations.subject: Cordillera ground warbler
relations.evidence: This species' main threat is habitat loss due to wholesale clearance of forest habitats as a result of logging, agricultural conversion and mining activities occurring within the range
relations.object_summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。
